description.en: Restores {ShieldHP} shield per second for {Duration}.
Restores {ShieldHP} shield per second for {Duration}.
Plants a bomb within {Range}. After a short delay, explosion inflicts {Dmg} damage and knocks back enemies.
Deploys a {WallSize} wide barrier that stops enemies and absorbs up to {FieldHP} damage.
Creates a сamouflage web that makes allies inside it invisible to enemies outside.
Returns {Feedback} of incoming damage back at the enemy for {Duration}.
After a {BlinkSpeed} delay, teleport over {Dist} in a direction you're facing.
Fires a homing projectile that deals {Dmg} damage and blinds target for {Duration}.
Deploys a barrier with {DomeRad} radius that absorbs up to {DomeHP} damage from enemy attacks.
Restores {ShieldHP} shield per second for {Duration}.
Press to jump, hold to rise higher. Consumes fuel on use.
Refills up to {FuelMax} fuel at {RegenFuel} units per tick.
Deploys a turret that attacks the closest enemy for {Dmg} damage per shot over {ActDuration}.
Hits an enemy within {ActRadius} and burns off {Eff} of its fuel.
Fires a homing missile that deals {ArmorDmg} damage to all armor segments in the blast area or {HullDmg} to shields.
After a {CastDuration} delay, grants unlimited ammo for {Duration}.
After a {CastDuration} delay, grants unlimited ammo for {Duration}.
Deploys a minefield lasting {Duration}. Each mine slows enemies on impact and deals {Dmg} damage.
Repairs your most damaged module for {RegenSpeed}% of armor per second. Lasts {Duration}.
Repairs all modules for {RegenSpeed}% armor per tick. Lasts {Duration}.
Deals {Dmg} damage to enemies, and pushes them and you away from each other with {Force} force.
Deploys a {WallSize} wide wall that blocks line of sight for {Duration}.
Boosts you maximum speed by {SpeedBoost} for {Duration}.
Robot gains a speed boost and reveals all enemies in {ActRadius} range for {ActDuration}.
Locks onto the enemy for {ActDuration}, dealing up to {Dmg} damage per second. Damage scales with proximity.
Deploys a barrier with a {DomeRad} radius that protects against attacks from above. Last for {ActDuration}.
Fires a single round that splits into a hail of projectiles mid-flight.
A crude, but effective Titan plasma autocannon for sustained fire at medium range.
Fires high-velocity unguided rockets with a wide splash radius.
A heavy plasma cannon for fast and precise long-range fire.
Heavy flak cannon. Charge to reduce spread at range, or fast tap in melee.
Shoots wide horizontal plasma arcs that damage everything on their way.
Fires a focused laser beam that wears down targets at medium range.
Light rapid-fire mortar. Deals damage in a wide area.
A single-shot Titan shotgun with a wide spread.
Heavy flamethrower. Deals extra damage over time with residual heat.
Hurls circular blades that bounce off walls causing massive damage.
A short-ranged Titan-class laser for prolonged skirmishes.
Salvo artillery system. Bombards a large area around target.
Fires a barrage of unguided rockets, each with a small blast radius.
Long range autocannon. Fires energy rounds grouped in short bursts.
An old reliable rotary cannon. Rains bullets on enemies within medium range.
Light sniper cannon. Delivers a single high-impact precision round on target.
Generates a sonic pulse that travels through enemies and physical obstacles.
Sustains a focused close-range electric beam over a long duration.
Fires a chain lightning that bounces to up to three enemies near the target. Charge to increase damage.
A fast and reliable autogun for close-range combat.
A fast and reliable autogun for close-range combat.
Launches magnetic bombs that stick to target and explode after a brief delay.
Heavy shotgun with a wide pellet spread. Brutal at close range.
Light flamethrower. Fatal up close, but can be avoided at range.
Heavy sniper cannon. Fires a single projectile with pinpoint accuracy.
A heavy mid-range cannon. Launches ballistic rockets with large splash radius.
Light flak cannon. Charge to reduce bullet spread and increase range.
Two-barrel rocket launcher. Fires heavy rockets in rapid succession.
Locks on target in sight and launches a hail of homing missiles.
Mid-range laser cannon. Fires a single charge that shreds shields and armor.
